name: ZenityX A1111 Full SD15 ControlNet
readme:
# ZenityX A1111 Full SD15 ControlNet

AUTOMATIC1111 v1.10.1 with ControlNet v1.1.455, the complete SD 1.5 ControlNet 1.1 fp16 set, five ControlNet++ models, QR Monster, three IP-Adapter models, and the CLIP-H image encoder. First startup downloads about 21.4 GiB. Open Pod logs to copy the generated WebUI login, then connect to HTTP port 7860. A 50-100 GB Network Volume mounted at /workspace is recommended for continued use.
